// CreateNewAccountCli creates a new account using the cli.
// Returns the id of the new account as well as the password that was generated
func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, loginName string) (string, string) {
	c, err := loadConfig()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	ctx := context.Background()
	password, err := base62.Random(16)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"accounts", "create", "password",
			"-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
			"-login-name", loginName,
			"-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
			"-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
			"-description", "e2e Account",
			"-format", "json",
		),
		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
	)
	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

	var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
	t.Cleanup(func() {
		AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
			e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
		)
		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
	})

	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)

	return newAccountId, password
}

// CreateNewAccountCli creates a new account using the cli.
// Returns the id of the new account as well as the password that was generated
func CreateNewAccountCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, loginName string) (string, string) {
	c, err := loadConfig()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	password, err := base62.Random(16)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
		e2e.WithArgs(
			"accounts", "create", "password",
			"-auth-method-id", c.AuthMethodId,
			"-login-name", loginName,
			"-password", "env://E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD",
			"-name", "e2e Account "+loginName,
			"-description", "e2e Account",
			"-format", "json",
		),
		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD", password),
	)
	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

	var newAccountResult accounts.AccountCreateResult
	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &newAccountResult)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	newAccountId := newAccountResult.Item.Id
	t.Cleanup(func() {
		AuthenticateAdminCli(t, ctx)
		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
			e2e.WithArgs("accounts", "delete", "-id", newAccountId),
		)
		require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
	})

	t.Logf("Created Account: %s", newAccountId)

	return newAccountId, password

19: func TestSessionCancelAdminCli(t *testing.T) {
20: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
21: 	c, err := loadConfig()
22: 	require.NoError(t, err)
23: 
24: 	boundary.AuthenticateAdminCli(t)
25: 	newOrgId := boundary.CreateNewOrgCli(t)
26: 	newProjectId := boundary.CreateNewProjectCli(t, newOrgId)
27: 	newHostCatalogId := boundary.CreateNewHostCatalogCli(t, newProjectId)
28: 	newHostSetId := boundary.CreateNewHostSetCli(t, newHostCatalogId)
29: 	newHostId := boundary.CreateNewHostCli(t, newHostCatalogId, c.TargetIp)
30: 	boundary.AddHostToHostSetCli(t, newHostSetId, newHostId)
31: 	newTargetId := boundary.CreateNewTargetCli(t, newProjectId, c.TargetPort)
32: 	boundary.AddHostSourceToTargetCli(t, newTargetId, newHostSetId)
33: 
34: 	// Connect to target to create a session
35: 	ctxCancel, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
36: 	errChan := make(chan *e2e.CommandResult)
37: 	go func() {
38: 		t.Log("Starting session...")
39: 		errChan <- e2e.RunCommand(ctxCancel, "boundary",
40: 			e2e.WithArgs(
41: 				"connect",
42: 				"-target-id", newTargetId,
43: 				"-exec", "/usr/bin/ssh", "--",
44: 				"-l", c.TargetSshUser,
45: 				"-i", c.TargetSshKeyPath,
46: 				"-o", "UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null",
47: 				"-o", "StrictHostKeyChecking=no",
48: 				"-o", "IdentitiesOnly=yes", // forces the use of the provided key
49: 				"-p", "{{boundary.port}}", // this is provided by boundary
50: 				"{{boundary.ip}}",
51: 				"hostname -i; sleep 60",
52: 			),
53: 		)
54: 	}()
55: 	t.Cleanup(cancel)
56: 
57: 	// Get list of sessions
58: 	ctx := context.Background()
59: 	var session *sessions.Session
60: 	err = backoff.RetryNotify(
61: 		func() error {
62: 			output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
63: 				e2e.WithArgs("sessions", "list", "-scope-id", newProjectId, "-format", "json"),
64: 			)
65: 			if output.Err != nil {
66: 				return backoff.Permanent(errors.New(string(output.Stderr)))
67: 			}

70: 			err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &sessionListResult)
71: 			if err != nil {

73: 			}

76: 			if sessionCount == 0 {
77: 				return errors.New("No items are appearing in the session list")
78: 			}
79: 
80: 			t.Logf("Found %d session(s)", sessionCount)
81: 			if sessionCount != 1 {
82: 				return backoff.Permanent(errors.New("Only one session was expected to be found"))
83: 			}
84: 
85: 			session = sessionListResult.Items[0]
86: 			return nil
87: 		},
88: 		backoff.WithMaxRetries(backoff.NewConstantBackOff(3*time.Second), 5),
89: 		func(err error, td time.Duration) {
90: 			t.Logf("%s. Retrying...", err.Error())
91: 		},
92: 	)

228: 	)
229: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))
230: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
231: 		output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "vault",
232: 			e2e.WithArgs("secrets", "disable", c.VaultSecretPath),
233: 		)

235: 	})

251: 			"-renewable=true",
252: 			"-format=json",
253: 		),

255: 	require.NoError(t, output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

261: 
262: 	// Create a credential store
